mapper.insert: INSERT INTO match_event (match_id, sport_type, team_id, player_id, related_player_id, type, description, event_time, extra_info) VALUES (#{matchId}, #{sportType}, #{teamId}, #{playerId}, #{relatedPlayerId}, #{type}, #{description}, #{eventTime}, #{extraInfo})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM match_event WHERE match_id = #{matchId} ORDER BY event_time ASC, id ASC

SELECT match_id AS matchId, sport_type AS sportType, sport_type_name AS sportTypeName, team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName, total_events AS totalEvents, football_goals AS footballGoals, football_assists AS footballAssists, yellow_cards AS yellowCards, red_cards AS redCards, football_fouls AS footballFouls, football_substitutions AS footballSubstitutions, two_pointers AS twoPointers, three_pointers AS threePointers, free_throws AS freeThrows, basketball_assists AS basketballAssists, rebounds, steals, blocks, basketball_fouls AS basketballFouls, turnovers, basketball_substitutions AS basketballSubstitutions, volleyball_scores AS volleyballScores, volleyball_assists AS volleyballAssists, blocks_vb AS blocksVb, spikes, serve_scores AS serveScores, volleyball_fouls AS volleyballFouls, volleyball_substitutions AS volleyballSubstitutions FROM v_match_event_stats WHERE match_id = #{matchId} ORDER BY team_id ASC

SELECT event_id AS eventId, match_id AS matchId, sport_type AS sportType, sport_type_name AS sportTypeName, team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName, player_id AS playerId, player_name AS playerName, player_jersey AS playerJersey, related_player_id AS relatedPlayerId, related_player_name AS relatedPlayerName, related_player_jersey AS relatedPlayerJersey, type, type_name AS typeName, description, event_time AS eventTime, event_time_display AS eventTimeDisplay, extra_info AS extraInfo, create_time AS createTime FROM v_match_event WHERE player_id = #{playerId} OR related_player_id = #{playerId} ORDER BY match_id ASC, event_time ASC

SELECT event_id AS eventId, match_id AS matchId, sport_type AS sportType, sport_type_name AS sportTypeName, team_id AS teamId, team_name AS teamName, player_id AS playerId, player_name AS playerName, player_jersey AS playerJersey, related_player_id AS relatedPlayerId, related_player_name AS relatedPlayerName, related_player_jersey AS relatedPlayerJersey, type, type_name AS typeName, description, event_time AS eventTime, event_time_display AS eventTimeDisplay, extra_info AS extraInfo, create_time AS createTime FROM v_match_event WHERE match_id = #{matchId} ORDER BY event_time ASC, event_id ASC
